entities.name: BREAD WHEAT
entities.description: The primary crop species studied, including the Japanese cultivar 'Fukuho-komugi' and Israeli line 'Oligoculm'.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Crop used in crosses with wheat to produce doubled-haploid populations.

entities.name: SPIKE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of spikes per plant, a quantitative trait analyzed for QTLs.

entities.name: SPIKE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the wheat spike, a quantitative trait analyzed for QTLs.

entities.name: GIGAS FEATURES
entities.description: Phenotypic characteristics consisting of extremely large spikes and leaves.

entities.name: RESTRICTED TILLERING
entities.description: A trait associated with the 'Oligoculm' allele and the Xpsp2999 marker.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map showing the relative positions of markers on chromosomes.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying genomic regions associated with quantitative traits.

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A specific statistical method used for QTL analysis.

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of DNA marker used for genotyping and map construction.

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used for genotyping.

entities.name: RAPD
entities.description: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA markers used for genotyping.

entities.name: INTER-SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of marker used for constructing the linkage map.

entities.name: XPSP2999
entities.description: An SSR locus identified as a possible marker for restricted tillering.

entities.name: HG
entities.description: The glume pubescence locus located on chromosome 1AS.

entities.name: DOUBLED-HAPLOID POPULATION
entities.description: A population of lines produced via wheat x maize crosses for genetic analysis.

entities.name: VERNALIZATION
entities.description: The cooling treatment applied to plants to accelerate flowering.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment used for evaluating spike number and length.

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The outdoor environment used for evaluating spike number and length across seasons.

entities.name: 24-H DAYLENGTH
entities.description: The light duration condition maintained in the greenhouse.

entities.name: AUTUMN-SOWN
entities.description: The timing of planting in the field environment.

entities.name: 1AS
entities.description: A specific region on chromosome 1A of wheat.

entities.name: 2DS
entities.description: A specific region on chromosome 2D of wheat.
